problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
